skills.name: PowerPoint Builder
skills.summary: Turn structured outlines into branded PowerPoint decks.
skills.description: Generates polished, on-brand PowerPoint decks from a structured outline. Handles title slides, agenda, content slides, and a closing slide using your team's template.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you have bullet-point notes or a meeting brief and need a presentable deck in minutes.

skills.name: Research Assistant
skills.summary: Plan, gather, and summarize research from internal sources.
skills.description: Breaks a topic into research subtasks, drafts a search plan, retrieves relevant internal documents, and produces a citation-rich summary.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need a starting brief on an unfamiliar topic with sources you can verify.

skills.name: Executive Email Writer
skills.summary: Draft concise, executive-ready emails from rough notes.
skills.description: Rewrites rough notes into clear, short emails with the right tone for an executive audience. Offers two variants: brief and slightly longer.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need to send a short, high-quality email and you only have bullet points.

skills.name: Cisco Demo Builder
skills.summary: Scaffold a Cisco product demo with talk track and config.
skills.description: Generates a demo runbook for a chosen Cisco product, including a step-by-step talk track, sample configuration, and recovery commands.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need to spin up a customer-ready demo and want a consistent talk track.

skills.name: AI Security Review
skills.summary: Run a structured security review on a code change.
skills.description: Walks through a pull request and flags common security issues: input validation gaps, injection risk, secret exposure, unsafe deserialization, weak auth checks.
skills.whenToUse: Use before merging a non-trivial change that touches user input, auth, or third-party calls.

skills.name: Lab Guide Generator
skills.summary: Turn a topology brief into a hands-on lab guide.
skills.description: Generates a structured lab guide with prerequisites, topology, step-by-step exercises, expected outputs, and a teardown.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need to publish a new hands-on lab from a topology and learning objectives.

skills.name: Meeting Summary
skills.summary: Summarize meeting notes into decisions, owners, and follow-ups.
skills.description: Reads raw meeting notes (or a transcript) and produces a structured summary: decisions, owners, dates, open questions, and a follow-up email draft.
skills.whenToUse: Use right after a meeting when you want a clean summary that you can send to attendees.

skills.name: Competitive Analysis
skills.summary: Compare a product against competitors on a fixed scorecard.
skills.description: Builds a side-by-side scorecard comparing a product against named competitors across pricing, capability, integration, and support, with citations.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need a quick comparison brief for a deal review or strategy meeting.
